normal: I'm so sorry [TARGET] for the late reply, I've been in back-to-back meetings all day and left my phone on my desk.
Oh man [TARGET], sorry I just saw this. My phone died all day and I just found a charger.
Sorry [TARGET], I fell into a deep sleep right after coming home from work, just woke up.
Hello [TARGET], sorry for the delay, I was outdoors all day and there was absolutely zero internet signal.
Sorry [TARGET], I was driving a long distance since noon and didn't dare to check my phone on the road.
ridiculous: Sorry [TARGET] for the late reply, my toddler nephew confiscated my phone and insisted on watching Cocomelon all day.
Oh man [TARGET], my right thumb suddenly cramped up terribly every time I touched the screen, I had to type with my nose.
Sorry [TARGET], I replied late because I was meditating waiting for inspiration from heaven on how to respond.
Hello [TARGET], my phone was hidden under the sofa by my cat, and I only retrieved it after she fell asleep.
Sorry [TARGET], my touchscreen went on strike and would only respond if I spoke to it in sign language.
realityBending: Sorry [TARGET], your notification got caught in an orbiting satellite and just dropped into my atmosphere this second.
Oh man [TARGET], I was trapped in a time zone where 1 minute equals 1 week of your time.
Sorry [TARGET], your message was encrypted in ancient alien linguistics, I needed hours to decode it.
Hello [TARGET], when you texted, my phone suddenly transformed into a slice of bread, I had to wait for the spell to wear off.
Sorry [TARGET], time suddenly froze right as I was about to hit send, it just thawed right now.
